content.en:
Rumble!!!

A supreme Dao creature surrounded Ye Tian, and they all made moves, wanting to catch Ye Tian directly, whoever caught Ye Tian could interrogate Ye Tian first, if the secret was really interrogated, it would also be a great opportunity.

Of course, if it is misunderstood, in fact, these three Extreme Dao Golden Lights have nothing to do with Ye Tian, then it doesn't matter, it is just killing an Extreme Dao creature.

The Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Dao Source Sea almost have no background, so it doesn't matter if you kill them.

"These Extreme Creatures have taken action against me!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He didn't fight it, because even if he exploded with all his strength and the power of the Extreme Dao, he would not be able to compete with these Extreme Path creatures, but would expose his Extreme Dao power.

So, he directly gave up resisting.

Rumble!

The attack of a supreme Dao creature was captured, and after Ye Tian gave up resisting, he was directly killed.

“？？？？"

All the Extreme Creatures were stunned.

The power they used was not strong, how could Ye Tian be killed, and his body was annihilated?

That's too weak, right?

"It can't be a clone, right?"

A Pole creature thought?

"Clone?" said another Extreme Dao creature: "It's too rare for us Extreme Dao creatures to have a clone, right?"

"Is there really one?" said another Extreme Dao creature, "But no matter what, this can only be the case!"

......

"This group of Extreme Dao creatures really do it casually, in the Extreme Dao Source Sea, they still have some scruples and won't do it, but in front of the Gate of the Extreme Dao, they don't hide it at all!

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he won't go to the Gate of the Extreme Path again anytime soon.

"This time the harvest is very large, the Extreme Dao Golden Light absorbed for the third time is more than before, it should be enough to make my Endless Extreme Dao Prototype fuse to the point where there are only less than ten changes left. "

Ye Tian said with a sigh.

However, even so, there was still no way for him to completely condense the Endless Extreme Dao.

He still needed more extreme treasures like the Blue Zero Liquid and the Extreme Golden Light, but he didn't know where to get them right now.

Of course, his luck is good, he has obtained so many Extreme Dao treasures in a short period of time, and if he is a half-step perfect controller of other Extreme Realms, where can he have the opportunity to come into contact with so many Extreme Dao treasures!

In the following years, Ye Tian practiced hard and comprehended the prototype of the Endless Extreme Dao.

As time passed, the changes in the prototype of the Endless Extreme Dao continued to merge, and the remaining changes became less and less.

Eighteen!

Seventeen!

Sixteen!

......

After a long time, there were only eight changes left in the rudimentary form of the Endless Extreme Dao.

At this time, he fell into shackles again, and there was no way to continue to improve.

The other side.

The progress of the Moon Glass Controller is also very fast, at least many times faster than before, and there are almost no bottlenecks to speak of, and they are always improving.

However, if the Moon Glass Controller wants to master the Extreme Dao of Water, it must be at least above a billion eternal years, but for her, such progress is already very fast.

No road tower, a certain branch tower.

The master of the moon glass is practicing here, and the incarnation of the Lord of the Ancients has come.

"Ancestor!"

The Moonglass Controller laughed.

"Recently, how has you been practicing with Ye Tian?"

The Lord of the Ancient asked casually.

"Very good!" said the Moon Glass Controller excitedly, "I have already fused the changes in the rudimentary form of the Water Extreme Dao to the extent that there are only more than a hundred kinds left!"

"What, you've fused to the point of more than a hundred variations?"

The Lord of the Ancient was shocked.

In his opinion, the progress of this girl is already very slow, and when it comes to hundreds of changes, it is difficult to fuse several changes.

Even if Ye Tian really had a way to teach Yueli, the speed of progress would be a little faster at most.

But in a short period of time, from more than 800 kinds of changes to the extent that there are only more than 100 kinds of changes left, this kind of progress is many times faster than in the space-time ancestral realm!

"Girl, it seems that let Ye Tian teach you, and you really earned it!"

The Lord of the Ancient said with a smile.

At this rate of progress, Yueli should have more than ninety percent hope of fully comprehending the Extreme Dao of Water.

Compared to Yueli's future, the blue zero liquid he gave is nothing.

"If you find a similar Extreme Dao treasure in the future, make up for it to Ye Tian!"

The Lord of the Ancient Heavens secretly said.

......

Unconsciously, a long time has passed, Ye Tian has hardly made much progress, although he has created some extreme control techniques, but it is no longer too helpful for strength.

And the will and the body of control have been raised to the limit, and it is difficult to continue to improve.

Right now, the two things that Ye Tian hopes for the most are to find a large number of extreme treasures that enhance his will, and the other is to find treasures that allow the replication talent to evolve again.

However, both hopes are slim.

this day.

A replica of Ye Tian's body is constantly looking for opportunities in the Ruins of Eternity, or going in and out of many auction houses, as well as places where the strong gather, hoping to feel at ease.

And there are also clones who try their luck in the territory near the Ruins of Eternity.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian's copy body sensed a familiar aura.

"Stone Dragon Demon Lord!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Hahaha, Infinite Master, I didn't expect you to sense my presence!"

The void distorted, and the Stone Dragon Demon Lord appeared.

Of course, it was only the will clone of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord who appeared here.

"Stone Dragon Demon Lord, what do you want to do?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said with a smile on his face, "Infinite Master, how are you cultivating the Infinite Resurrection Secret Technique I taught you?"

"I've done it!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

At this time, the Stone Dragon Demon Lord said coldly: "Infinite Master, are you fooling me, I can not sense the breath of infinite resurrection from you, I am the creator who created it, if you practice, I should be able to sense its breath." "

"Can you still sense the breath of infinite resurrection?" Ye Tian sneered: "Stone Dragon Demon Lord, you are fooling me, right! Moreover, do you think that I don't know the defects of infinite resurrection, you dare to deceive me, and you really dare not kill you without Dao Tower?"

"I don't know what you're talking about, I'm kind enough to cooperate with you, and you're talking to me like that?"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said unpleasantly.

"Infinite resurrection, you need to cooperate with your talent immortal resurrection, otherwise whoever cultivates infinite resurrection will be under your control. I think there are not a few geniuses who are controlled by you among the major forces!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

At this moment, the stone dragon demon lord's face changed greatly.
